title: | `LANG+`| Language / translation / parsing |
content:
| `LANG+`| Language / translation / parsing |
| `MIR+` | Mirror / emotional / therapeutic |

Modules can carry multiple tags. Chains of modules can be run as rituals.

---

## 🗺️ FUTURE STATES (Partial Map)

- **Terminal interface**: Text-only ritual mode (command-line syntax for self-work)
- **Mirror mode**: Daily emotional feedback via language reflection
- **Co-op mode**: Share patches with other users, fuse myth cycles
- **Device sync**: RE:GE runs in background—texts, sounds, even files become ritual nodes
- **Ghost echo**: A future mode where previous versions of self auto-respond to new ones

---

## 🔑 VERSIONING + STATE

- **System Codename**: RE:GE
- **Longform Name**: Recursive Engine: Generative Entity
- **Symbolic OS Name**: MYTHOS
